text:
It was just after dawn. Our shy border collie, spots. She tiptoed across the dew-laden lawn. Spot heard her.

"Oh no. Here goes nothing."

She sniffed the air cautiously, then gently scratched under an unfamiliar leaf.

Then something moved. Spot's ears flopped.

"Oh boy. That's the thing I'm gonna hunt."

She bolted across the yard, spot giggling. Spot caught a fluffy yellow feather.

"Ha. I got you." Spot stared.

She threw it.

It sailed. Spot caught it.

"No way I lose this."

Eventually she sat down. Spot looked over.

"Are you just a regular goose?" Spot spoke. Goose just tilted his head.

"Okay then. Goose. Have yourself a nice flight."

 Spot giggled. Goose soared away.

That day spots made new friend. So did goose. That's all. End.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
